_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Red Sox at Yankees postponed, will make up Aug. 29 doubleheader
items.snark: Mother Nature doing Sox fans a favor by sparing them another beatdown in the Bronx.

items.headline: Red Sox shopping catcher Connor Wong, fielding calls on relievers
items.snark: Trading a 30-year-old backup catcher with 4.4 WAR, this is the big swing Craig promised.

items.headline: Red Sox trio of catchers drawing trade interest ahead of deadline
items.snark: Three catchers, zero home runs at Fenway, but sure, other teams want our surplus.

items.headline: Garrett Whitlock ready to begin rehab assignment with WooSox
items.snark: Whitlock coming back just in time to watch this bullpen blow more leads.

items.headline: Garrett Crochet suffers lat setback, timeline pushed back
items.snark: Crochet calling it a minor setback while the entire rotation bursts into flames.

items.headline: Kayshon Boutte to participate in Patriots minicamp
items.snark: Boutte showing up to minicamp after skipping OTAs, that'll definitely get him traded.
